_schema: 01_candidates — written by twitter-reply-scout (Run 1). Human fills `anchor`, then saves as 02_anchored.json.

candidates.author: <handle>
candidates.posted_at: ISO-8601, e.g. 2026-06-07T12:00:00Z — MUST be within ~48h of batch date; older = dropped
candidates.hook_summary: one line: what the thread is actually about
candidates.why_relevant: why this fits the indie-builder/agentic niche
